achievements.title: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) Achievement
achievements.description: Successfully obtained CEH certification with 95% score. Journey through ethical hacking methodologies and tools. The certification validates comprehensive understanding of ethical hacking concepts, methodologies, and real-world application of security tools.

achievements.title: INE Certified Cloud Associate (ICCA)
achievements.description: Validated cloud computing expertise across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform. Demonstrated proficiency in IaaS, PaaS, cloud security, identity management, and hands-on infrastructure deployment with a 93% exam score.
